afkhold.config.title: AFKHold Config
afkhold.config.general.kick_on_damage.de: Automatically disconnects when you take damage while AFKHolding
afkhold.config.general.kick_on_totem.des: Automatically disconnects when your totem is popped while AFKHolding
afkhold.config.autoclicker.autoclicker_m: When enabled, held mouse buttons (LMB/RMB) are rapidly clicked instead of held down
afkhold.config.autoclicker.autoclicker_d: Time between each autoclicker click in milliseconds
